topic: WH Words (What, When, Where, Who, Why, Whom, Whose, Which, How)

tasks.prompt: Write 5 original English sentences using WH Words (What, When, Where, Who, Why, Whom, Whose, Which, How).
tasks.hindiPrompt: WH Words (What, When, Where, Who, Why, Whom, Whose, Which, How) का उपयोग करते हुए 5 नए वाक्य लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: What is your name? When will you come? Where do you live? Who is this? Why did you come late?

tasks.prompt: Write a short paragraph (5-6 lines) using WH Words (What, When, Where, Who, Why, Whom, Whose, Which, How).
tasks.hindiPrompt: WH Words (What, When, Where, Who, Why, Whom, Whose, Which, How) का उपयोग करते हुए एक छोटा पैराग्राफ लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: Whose bag is this? Which book do you like? How do you do this? Whom are you talking to? What are you doing?

tasks.hindiPrompt: नीचे दिए गए वाक्य का अंग्रेज़ी अनुवाद करें।
इस वाक्य में गलती ठीक कीजिए।

tasks.prompt: Write a short 4-line dialogue using WH Words (What, When, Where, Who, Why, Whom, Whose, Which, How).
tasks.hindiPrompt: WH Words (What, When, Where, Who, Why, Whom, Whose, Which, How) का उपयोग करते हुए एक संवाद लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: Who was she? Why did this happen? Whose mistake is this? Which color do you prefer?
